content.en:
Soon, many half-step perfect controllers came to the Yang Yan Forbidden Land.

Then, under the command of the Flying Dragon Controller, the peak perfect controller, he advanced towards the depths of the Yang Flame Forbidden Land.

Not only their will clones, but even the main body must enter the depths of the Yang Flame Forbidden Land.

At this time, all the half-step perfect controllers panicked.

As a result, a peak half-step perfect controller questioned: "Wyvern master, it's okay for us to enter the depths of the Yang Yan Forbidden Land with our will clone, why do we have to go there too? The creatures there are too terrifying, and there are even powerful creatures that are not weaker than the top half-step perfect controllers, and maybe there are terrifying creatures comparable to the peak half-step perfect controllers." If our essence is in the past, if it falls, it will really fall!"

"Yes, how can there be a reason to let the ontology pass, isn't this sending death?"

"Flying Dragon Master, I don't want to enter the depths of the Yang Yan Forbidden Land, I'm ready to go back!"

Some half-step perfect controllers said.

The Flying Dragon Controller smiled slightly, he naturally knew that these half-step perfect controllers were unwilling, after all, no one wanted to die.

But are they qualified to rebel?

Rumble!!!!

The aura of the wyvern's wielder permeates the surroundings, blocking time and space.

"This is the order of the Ten Thousand Dragons Palace, do you dare to disobey it, if anyone dares to betray the Ten Thousand Dragons Palace, I will kill them!" The Flying Dragon Controller said coldly: "According to my order, enter the depths of the Yang Yan Forbidden Land, you still have a chance to live." If you dare to run away now, you will be 100% dead!"

The Wyvern Master doesn't want to lose time, because if you delay a little time, the chance of exposure is greater.

In case it is exposed, if he wants to obtain the Extreme Creation Substance, don't think about it, it will definitely not be his turn.

At this time, many half-step perfect controllers didn't dare to say leave, after all, the gap between their strength and the Flying Dragon Controller was too big, and the Flying Dragon Controller could kill them instantly.

If it's a clone, they're not afraid.

But their body is also here, so they have to be cowardly!

As a result, these half-step perfect controllers could only follow the Wyvern Controllers to the depths of the Sunfire Forbidden Land, and their clones were also driven into the depths of the Sunfire Forbidden Land, and none of them could leave.

......

In the depths of the Sun Flame Forbidden Land, the flames here are in the sky, and the void is filled with an incomparably terrifying power of fire, burning many time and space, and many Dao are suppressed or distorted here.

When the Ten Realm-level masters came here, they would also be killed on the spot.

However, ordinary half-step perfect controllers came here, but they felt a little uncomfortable, and nothing else.

But at this moment, many half-step perfect controllers looked extremely nervous, so almost all of the creatures that could appear here were comparable to half-step perfect masters.

Soon.

The Wyvern Controller had the clones of the half-step perfect controllers to attract firepower, and his clones were heading to the depths of the Sunflame Forbidden Lands in an attempt to retrieve the Extreme Creation Substance there.

Soon.

Some of the clones of the half-step perfect master fled in all directions, only to be overtaken by some incredibly powerful creatures, killing them one by one.

"My doppelganger has fallen!"

The Ten Elements Ancestor's face was ugly.

It wasn't clear to him where he was now, but they were half-step perfect controllers who were used as cannon fodder by the Wyvern Masters, who had come here to test and attract the attention of those powerful creatures.

And the purpose of the Wyvern Masters is afraid that it is for a certain treasure, and they are the victims.

"This matter must be inseparable from the father of the Flying Dragon Master, the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus, the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus is one of the six hall masters of the Ten Thousand Dragons Palace, and he is the perfect controller, and he can't count on the other high-level leaders of the Ten Thousand Dragons Palace, so he must ask for help!"

Ten Elements Ancestor thought to himself.

So, he immediately summoned his little apprentice, Ye Tian.

He already knew that his apprentice Ye Tian had become a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, and his strength was no less than that of a weaker perfect controller, even if he couldn't defeat the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus, it was not much worse.

Moreover, Ye Tian is still the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm of the Daoless Tower, and in terms of identity and status, he is not comparable to the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus.

Therefore, as long as Ye Tian came, even the Ten Thousand Dragons Hall would not be able to help him.

......

"The transmission of the Ten Elements Ancestor of the Master?"

Ye Tian immediately accepted the content of the summons from Shizun.

It's a distress message, and there's not much to it.

"The Ten Thousand Dragons Hall wants to sacrifice the master, it's really hateful!"

Ye Tian was extremely angry.

Immediately, he sent a replica body to the Forbidden Land.

And at the moment.

The Wyvern Controller has already completely locked the specific location of the Extreme Creation Thing, and there are quite a few Extreme Creation Materials this time.

Therefore, he didn't want to waste time and let the bodies of those half-step perfect controllers attract firepower, and as for how much it would fall, he didn't care.

In short, if nothing else, these half-step perfect controllers are afraid that they will all fall, even if they are lucky enough to survive a few people, it will not help.

And he is not worried about his safety, after all, once something happens to him, he can immediately ask his father for help, and his father will act as soon as possible.

But once his father made a move, it was completely exposed.

Therefore, as a last resort, his father could not make a move.

Deep in the forbidden land, above a mountain range.

Golden flowers grow here, and each golden flower contains the breath of the ultimate substance.

The Wyvern Controller was no stranger to the aura of the Extreme Creation Substance, and his father had once purchased a Extreme Creation Treasure at a great price, so he still knew something about it.

"Sure enough, there is a pole-making substance, and a creature before contained the breath of the extreme-making substance, so we concluded that there is a pole-making substance here, and it seems that this is indeed the case. The Wyvern Controller said excitedly.

The creatures here are not keen on the polar material, after all, the polar material does not improve any strength, they do not know the preciousness of the polar material, they will only treat it as an ordinary treasure, so they are too lazy to devour it, and only occasionally will eat the polar material.

For example, the creatures that died at the hands of the Ten Thousand Dragons Hall before were like this, which revealed that there was a secret of the creation of the material here.

Although many people had seen the pole-making substance, they didn't know it, and they still sent it to his father, the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus, and only then did they recognize the pole-making substance.

Then, his father used the treasure to lock down the approximate location of the Polar Creation Substance.

Now, he had finally found it, and he had attracted the attention of many powerful beings with the lives of other half-step perfect masters, so the Extreme Creation Material here was his.

The other side.

The Ten Elements Ancestor was in trouble, and a horde of terrifying creatures laid siege to him.

Although most of these creatures are comparable to ordinary half-step perfect controllers, and there are no creatures comparable to top half-step perfect controllers, they are not something he can compete with!

"I hope Ye Tian can come soon!"

The Ten Elements Ancestor looked forward to it.

With one face, the Ten Elements Ancestor was injured, and the injury was not light.

At this moment, time and space distorted, and a figure walked out.

"Master, you're okay!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Ye Tian, you're finally here!"

The Ten Elements Ancestor breathed a sigh of relief.

Ye Tian is here, his fate is saved!
